response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience, deep technical breadth across languages (including Python, JavaScript, D, C/C++), and a proven track record in distributed systems and open-source tooling, but lacks explicit evidence of building enterprise-scale experimentation or growth platforms, feature flagging systems, or AI-driven measurement frameworks — key requirements for this role. His career gap and absence of metrics-driven experimentation work raise concerns about recent relevance.
strengths: Extensive experience with distributed systems and high-throughput services (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong full-stack proficiency across JavaScript/TypeScript, C++, D, and Python with hands-on production code ownership
Demonstrated technical leadership through open-source tools, workshops, and mentoring in testing and CI/CD practices
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or shipping experimentation frameworks, feature flighting, or growth measurement systems
Career gap since October 2025 raises questions about current engagement and recent technical momentum
Lacks explicit experience with AI tools accelerating engineering velocity or bias/risk controls in experimentation

key_factors.factor: Broad technical depth and systems experience
Career gap and recent activity ambiguity
